site.name: HelloBrand
site.description: Upload any brand deal contract and get a plain-English breakdown with risk flags, deliverables, and payment terms. Free to start, no signup required.

hero.headline: Don't sign another brand deal blindly.
hero.subheadline: Upload a contract and get the plain-English breakdown: risks, deliverables, and payment terms, all for free. No signup required.
hero.trust_line: No signup. No legal jargon. 100% private.

features.headline: Every contract broken down into what actually matters.
features.body: See the summary, risks, and money terms without reading every line.
features.summary_body: Know what the contract is really asking for, in words you understand.
features.risks_body: Catch usage rights traps, payment gaps, and terms that deserve a second look.
features.payment_body: See what you owe, what the brand owes you, and when it's all due.

sample.headline: Try a sample contract before you upload your own.
sample.body: Get the summary, risk flags, and payment details from a real example. No account needed.

bullets.summary: Plain-language summary of what the deal actually says
bullets.risks: Risk flags explained in simple terms
bullets.payment: Deliverables and payment timing at a glance

save.headline: When the deal looks good, save it to a free workspace.
save.body: Create your free account after the breakdown, not before. Keep the contract, brand emails, and follow-ups in one place.

bullets.email: Link brand emails to the deal
bullets.return: Come back anytime without starting over

track.headline: Track deliverables and chase payments without the spreadsheet.
track.body: Your saved workspace keeps every due date, outstanding balance, and payment status right next to the contract terms.

bullets.dates: Track due dates and outstanding balances
bullets.status: Keep payment status beside the contract terms
bullets.organized: Stay organized across all your active deals

steps.step1_body: Upload a PDF, DOCX, or TXT file. No account needed to see the full breakdown.
steps.step2_body: Plain-English summary, risk flags, deliverables, and payment terms in one pass.
steps.step3_body: Create a workspace to track the deal, follow up with the brand, and get paid.

finalCta.badge: The first upload takes less than 10 seconds
finalCta.headline: Your next contract shouldn't be a guessing game.
finalCta.body: Upload one contract, see the full breakdown, and decide if the deal is worth your time.

footer.disclaimer: HelloBrand is not a law firm. This is not legal advice.

pricing.headline: Start free. Upgrade when the deals stack up.
pricing.subheadline: From your first brand contract to a full roster of partnerships. Upload and analyze free, then upgrade as your workspace grows.
pricing.trust_line: Cancel anytime. No lock-in. One organized partnership can cover multiple months of HelloBrand.
pricing.social_proof_headline: Built for creators who manage their own deals
pricing.social_proof_body: From solo creators to multi-roster managers, HelloBrand keeps the business side of influence organized.

testimonials.jamie_quote: I used to lose track of deliverables and payment terms across five brand deals. HelloBrand caught a discrepancy in a contract that would have cost me $2,000.
testimonials.alex_quote: Managing three creators used to mean spreadsheets and missed deadlines. Now everything is in one place and the AI flags conflicts before they become problems.
testimonials.morgan_quote: The synced inbox changed everything. I can see brand emails next to contract terms and action items without switching tabs. Worth every penny.

footer.trials: Basic includes a 14-day trial. Premium includes a 7-day trial.

quickActions.title: What to work on next
quickActions.body: Start with the items most likely to unblock cash flow, approvals, or delivery.

activePartnerships.title: Active partnerships
activePartnerships.emptyBody: Start with one workspace and this dashboard will begin surfacing due dates, payment follow-ups, and risk review.

conflicts.title: Cross-partnership conflicts
conflicts.description: HelloBrand found overlapping category, exclusivity, or timing signals across active workspaces.

dates.daysOverdue: {count, plural, one {# day overdue} other {# days overdue}}

summary.activePartnerships: {count, plural, one {# active partnership} other {# active partnerships}}
summary.deliverablesDueThisWeek: {count, plural, one {# deliverable due this week} other {# deliverables due this week}}
summary.overdueInvoices: {count, plural, one {# overdue invoice} other {# overdue invoices}}
summary.highRiskContracts: {count, plural, one {# high-risk contract to review} other {# high-risk contracts to review}}

nextSteps.openWorkspaceAndReview: Open workspace and review the next step

actions.overduePayoutBody: {campaignName} is still overdue. Check the payment thread and nudge the brand.
actions.contractWatchoutsBody: {campaignName} has high-severity issues that should be checked before work continues.
actions.deliverableComingUpTitle: A deliverable is coming up soon
actions.workspaceReadyBody: {campaignName} has finished processing and is ready for your review.
actions.resumeDraftBody: {campaignName} has a saved draft waiting for you.
actions.workspaceProcessingBody: {campaignName} is being analyzed. You'll be notified when it's ready.

snapshot.trackedRevenueNote: {count, plural, one {# total workspace} other {# total workspaces}}
snapshot.outstandingPayoutsOverdue: {count, plural, one {# overdue invoice} other {# overdue invoices}}
snapshot.riskAlertsWarnings: {count, plural, one {# cross-partnership warning} other {# cross-partnership warnings}}

welcome.preview: Upload your first brand document and start your HelloBrand workspace.
welcome.heading: Welcome to HelloBrand
welcome.intro: Thanks for creating your HelloBrand account. You can now start intake, upload partnership docs, and keep creator deals organized in one workspace.
welcome.firstStep: Your first step is to upload a brand document like a contract, brief, or campaign email so HelloBrand can pull the important details into your workspace.
welcome.fallbackLinkLabel: If the button does not work, open this link:
